text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally the day of Agnes Tachyon's debut race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was lamenting over the fact that I ran out of
black tea in the lab. How unbecoming of me to
forget to restock, no?
choice_data_list: (That's got nothing to do with today's race!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. You can go out to purchase some for
me while I race. Ceylon or Keemun is my
preference.
choice_data_list: There's no way I'm missing your race.
There's no way I'm missing your race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, would you look at the time. It appears I
must get going.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you can't find either of the two I mentioned,
Assam tea will also do. Would you be so kind as
to deliver it to my lab?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon saunters out of the waiting room.
